name: io.github.CDCStream/captapi
description: Social media data: 170 tools across 27 platforms plus account usage (YouTube, TikTok, Instagram, X, Truth Social, Kick, Kwai & more), one key.

environmentVariables.name: CAPTAPI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your capt_live_... API key. Create one at https://captapi.com/dashboard/api-keys (100 free credits).

environmentVariables.name: CAPTAPI_BASE_URL
environmentVariables.description: Override the Captapi API base URL (default https://api.captapi.com).
